title: Strategy research queue snapshot
status_boundary: All entries are research or fixture states only; none are production-ready or live-trading candidates.

strategies.operator_fit: High priority: single-exchange spot/perp carry, minute-to-day workflow, suitable for offline scan and manual confirmation.
strategies.next_action: Use data_collection_plan.json to backfill 20 supported Binance partitions, then apply instrument_metadata_resolution.json and instrument-assumption with evidence hash to resolve 6 metadata blockers before validation-ready.

strategies.operator_fit: High priority: dated futures basis carry, day-to-week holding, suitable for semi-automatic scan and manual confirmation.
strategies.next_action: Use data_collection_plan.json to backfill 13 supported Binance partitions, then resolve 6 instrument and 6 historical orderbook/depth blockers before validation-ready.

strategies.operator_fit: Medium-high priority: directional perp filter, useful for alerts and manual confirmation but requires strict signal frequency and venue definition controls.
strategies.next_action: Backfill open_interest, trade/perp candles, funding and mark partitions, then fix OI venue definition before validation.

strategies.operator_fit: Medium priority: market-neutral concept, but cross-exchange margin, API and inventory complexity require human review.
strategies.next_action: Backfill funding, mark/index, trade, fee, instrument and depth_volume partitions; verify preallocated-margin assumption before evaluator work.

strategies.operator_fit: Low-medium priority: only allowed as a 1m-5m filter for existing strategies, not as standalone HFT or market making.
strategies.next_action: Accumulate orderbook snapshots and trade/fee partitions; keep as filter research until data quality and cost impact are proven.

strategies.operator_fit: Medium priority only as alert plus manual confirmation; spot-only, no leverage, but issuer/redemption risk must be reviewed by a human.
strategies.next_action: Fill manual_stablecoin_status_checklist for the reviewed asset, venue and time window before any validation-ready promotion.

strategies.operator_fit: Medium priority: minute-to-hour perp signal/filter, no cross-exchange transfer, but mean-reversion failure and threshold overfit risk require human review.
strategies.next_action: Add premium_index_kline data model, Binance connector mapping and coverage checks; then backfill funding, mark/index, trade-derived perp candles, fees and instrument metadata before validation-ready.

strategies.operator_fit: High priority as alert and risk filter for funding, premium and momentum candidates; not a standalone automated entry signal.
strategies.next_action: Generate a data collection plan for mark/index, perp candles, trade, funding, fees and instrument metadata; then test whether dislocation filters improve existing evaluators.

strategies.operator_fit: Medium-high priority as crowded-positioning alert and late-entry filter; standalone contrarian execution needs human review and replay evidence.
strategies.next_action: Backfill funding, open_interest, mark, trade-derived perp candles and fee partitions; keep venue-specific OI definitions fixed before comparing exchanges.

strategies.operator_fit: High priority as portfolio-level filter for minute-to-day strategies; use to down-rank carry and basis during volatility expansion.
strategies.next_action: Generate a data collection plan for spot/perp candles, trades, mark and fees; then test avoided drawdown versus missed opportunity on existing strategy fixtures.
